order.findDomain: Locate your dimensional portal and verify availability.
order.premiumAvailable: EUREKA! Your dimensional portal {domain} is available and it is a premium specimen! Automatic registration is suspended. Transmit electronic correspondence to {email} if you wish to acquire this portal for {cost} per annual cycle.
order.premiumTaken: Most unfortunate! Your dimensional portal {domain} is already occupied! Do you already possess it? You may transfer its registration — it is a premium specimen. Automatic registration is suspended. Transmit electronic correspondence to {email} if you wish to acquire this portal for {cost} per annual cycle.
order.available: EUREKA! Your dimensional portal {domain} is available! You may register it for {cost}. Renewal funding will be {renewal}.
order.taken: Most unfortunate! Your dimensional portal {domain} is already occupied! Do you already possess it? You may transfer its registration for {cost}. Renewal funding will be {renewal}.
order.whoisPrivacyLabel: Identity Concealment Protocol for {cost} / annual cycle
order.whatIsWhoisPrivacy: What is this Identity Concealment Protocol?
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the research covenant terms
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The research subscription will automatically renew after every annual cycle at {cost} until experiment termination.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By activating this parameter, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription laboratory apparatus that automatically renews (As Per The Research Covenant Outlined Above) and is billed to the Monetary Transfer Device you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the researcher portal (Here) select the active apparatus and activate the Abort link or transmit correspondence to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol. By activating the parameter and placing your requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have studied the research covenant above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: Processing... please remain stationary! Searching for this dimensional portal designation.
order.loadingDomainFields: Processing... please remain stationary! Loading portal configuration fields.

nameservers.title: Dimensional Portal Name Servers
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Laboratory-recommended name servers have been applied. Activate Update to commit to journal.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to eradicate your dimensional portal name server from the apparatus.

eppCode.title: Transmit EPP Authentication Cipher
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to transmit the EPP Authentication Cipher to the registered electronic correspondence address?

whois.title: Identity Concealment Protocol
whois.renewalNote: Identity Concealment Protocol renews every 12 lunar months from activation date. Identity Concealment Protocol addon renewal funding is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Identity Concealment Protocol is not available for this top-level portal designation.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Identity Concealment Protocol is currently activated for {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Deactivate and Abort Identity Concealment Protocol
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy Shield conceals the identity of a Registrant when a researcher performs a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's dimensional portal.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of Contact Privacy Shield is that the Registrant's identity, including laboratory address, telecommunication node, and electronic correspondence address, is shielded from data harvesters, identity extraction specialists and information scavengers.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants activate the Contact Privacy Shield protocol, masked contact data appears in the public WHOIS database.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact Privacy Shield is available for {cost} per portal per annual cycle.
whois.enableNow: To activate Contact Privacy Shield for your Dimensional Portal, Submit Requisition Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Identity Concealment Protocol funding: {cost} per annual cycle. Are you sure you want to submit this requisition?
whois.orderSuccess: Identity Concealment Protocol requisition submitted successfully!
whois.enableMessage: Your dimensional portal {hostname} has a funded Identity Concealment Protocol addon that is not yet activated. Would you like to activate it now?
whois.whoisEnabled: Identity Concealment Protocol is now fully operational.
whois.disableTitle: Deactivate and Abort Identity Concealment Protocol
whois.disableMessage: Your dimensional portal {hostname} Identity Concealment Protocol addon is currently activated. Are you sure you want to deactivate and abort it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Identity Concealment Protocol has been deactivated and aborted.

whoisToggle.title: Identity Concealment Protocol Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your dimensional portal {domain} Identity Concealment Protocol addon is Activated
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your dimensional portal {domain} Identity Concealment Protocol addon is Deactivated
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Activate the Identity Concealment Protocol?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Deactivate and Abort it?

lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Disengage the portal lock mechanism?

dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS authentication record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This operation will eradicate all DNSSEC authentication records for this dimensional portal.

dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please populate at least one DNSSEC authentication record.

renew.title: Renew Portal Registration
renew.tip1: Dimensional portal should be renewed on or before expiration date.
renew.tip2: If dimensional portal has expired, a grace period may exist from expiration date to renew.
renew.tip3: Activate Identity Concealment Protocol to shield your Contact Dossier when a researcher performs a WHOIS lookup on your portal.
renew.alreadyRenewed: This dimensional portal has already been renewed — experiment successful!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your dimensional portal, please remit the existing funding requisition document.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total funding required: {cost}. Are you sure you want to submit this renewal requisition?
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Dimensional portal renewal requisition submitted successfully!
